sub_modules.qgemm_quantize_matrix: Combinational FP32-to-signed-quantized conversion using Q15 scale and signed zero-point, preserving testbench input packing order.
sub_modules.qgemm_int_matmul: Combinational signed integer GEMM over centered quantized values with INT32 accumulators.
sub_modules.qgemm_dequantize_matrix: Combinational dequantization from INT32 accumulators to packed FP32 bit-pattern outputs using Q15 scale product.
